summary: iOS-style notification system fully verified. Old Sonner toasts completely removed. New notifications slide in from TOP with glass-morphism design, auto-dismiss after 4s, red XCircle error icon, 'Error' label, 'now' timestamp, and swipe indicator pill. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All notification features working on desktop and mobile.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns version=1.0.0, min_version=1.0.0, status=healthy
Backend: POST /api/errors/report accepts basic error (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/errors/report accepts error with severity field (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/errors/report accepts minimal data (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 200/202 for valid credentials
Backend: GET /api/admin/announcements returns list (authenticated)
Backend: GET /api/admin/system-health returns health data
Backend: GET /api/ops/escalations returns list (authenticated)
Backend: GET /api/admin/knowledge-base returns list (authenticated)
Frontend Desktop: iOS notification appears at TOP of screen (y=12px)
Frontend Desktop: Notification shows 'Error' label with red color (#EF4444)
Frontend Desktop: Notification shows 'Invalid credentials' message
Frontend Desktop: Notification shows 'now' timestamp
Frontend Desktop: Glass-morphism background (rgba 0.92 opacity, blur 24px)
Frontend Desktop: Rounded corners (16px border-radius)
Frontend Desktop: Swipe indicator pill present at bottom
Frontend Desktop: Notification auto-dismisses after ~4 seconds
Frontend Desktop: Old Sonner toaster NOT present (data-sonner-toaster selector)
Frontend Desktop: No old bottom toasts (0 .sonner-toast elements)
Frontend Desktop: Admin dashboard loads cleanly with no stray notifications
Frontend Desktop: Desktop sidebar shows TOOLS section (Announcements, System Health, Escalations, KB)
Frontend Desktop: Sidebar collapse toggle works correctly
Frontend Mobile: iOS notification appears at TOP (y=12px)
Frontend Mobile: Admin dashboard loads with bottom navigation
Frontend Mobile: No stray notifications on mobile admin
critical_code_review_comments: AppNotification.js is well-structured with proper pub/sub pattern for notification dispatch
toast.js properly routes all toast.error/success/info/warning calls to new notify API
NotificationContainer has correct z-index (99999) and fixed positioning at top
Auto-dismiss timer (4s for normal, 8s for critical) working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test errors with TEST_pytest_ prefix submitted to /api/errors/report
context_for_next_testing_agent: iOS-style notification system verified: (1) AppNotification.js replaces Sonner with slide-in-from-top notifications; (2) toast.js routes to notify API; (3) NotificationContainer at z-index 99999, fixed top; (4) NotificationCard has glass-morphism, red error icon, 'now' timestamp, swipe pill; (5) Auto-dismiss 4s normal, 8s critical; (6) Old Sonner components exist in /components/ui/sonner.jsx but are NOT imported or used anywhere; (7) All admin tools still work (Announcements, System Health, Escalations, KB).
